message:
refactor(async): migrate fcp-core, registry, sandbox, tailscale, telemetry from direct tokio to fcp-async-core

Replace tokio::time::sleep, tokio::sync::{Mutex,RwLock}, tokio::task_local!,
tokio::runtime::Builder, and #[tokio::test] with fcp-async-core equivalents
across five crates. fcp-sandbox switches to std::sync::Mutex where the lock
scope is synchronous. Removes tokio from normal deps in sandbox, tailscale,
and core; moves fcp-async-core to normal deps where needed. Test vectors
regenerated with updated key material.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
